channel.title: AgentIndexed — AI Agents Directory
channel.description: Newly indexed AI agents and tools.

item.title: Claude Code — Coding Agents
item.description: Terminal-first agentic coding from Anthropic with Computer Use integration, multi-file edits, persistent shell sessions, Git operations, and fine-tuning support.

item.title: Cursor — Coding Agents
item.description: AI-native IDE with parallel Cloud Agents and 100K+ enterprise users.

item.title: Devin — Coding Agents
item.description: Fully autonomous AI software engineer showing 8-12x efficiency gains in production (Nubank case study), cloud sandbox with persistent state, GitHub integration, and enterprise adoption growing 40% MoM.

item.title: CrewAI — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Production multi-agent framework with 5K+ GitHub stars, role-based collaboration, async execution, and 1500+ company adoptions.

item.title: LangGraph — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Stateful, graph-based agent workflow framework from LangChain.

item.title: Agent S2 — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: Open-source GUI automation framework for building desktop and browser agents with vision.

item.title: AgentQL — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: AI-powered web scraping and automation with a semantic query language for page elements.

item.title: Airtop — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: Enterprise-grade cloud browser infrastructure for AI agent automation at scale.

item.title: Browser Use — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: Open-source framework to let LLMs navigate and interact with any website programmatically.

item.title: Browserbase — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: Scalable headless browser infrastructure purpose-built for running AI agents in production.

item.title: Dia Browser — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: AI-native browser from Atlassian and the Browser Company with built-in agent workflows.

item.title: Manus — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: Autonomous digital employee with Browser Operator extension acquired by Meta for web-based task execution.

item.title: MultiOn — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: Reliable web automation API with CAPTCHA handling for building production browser agents.

item.title: OpenAI Operator — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: ChatGPT autonomous web agent with human checkpoints using Computer Use Agent technology.

item.title: Skyvern — Browser & Computer Use
item.description: Production browser automation with 21.5K GitHub stars, 10M+ executed workflows, vision-first automation, and sub-300ms response times.

item.title: Aider — Coding Agents
item.description: Terminal-first pair programmer that edits code in local repos, preserves Git history, and supports multi-file changes.

item.title: Amazon Q Developer — Coding Agents
item.description: AWS-native AI coding assistant with Lambda, CloudWatch, infrastructure support, and security scanning.

item.title: CodeRabbit — Coding Agents
item.description: AI-powered PR reviewer with inline suggestions, security scanning, and automatic code quality checks.

item.title: Codex CLI — Coding Agents
item.description: OpenAI's lightweight, open-source terminal coding agent with fast execution and strong benchmark scores.

item.title: Kiro — Coding Agents
item.description: Spec-driven development agent that writes specs, auto-generates tasks, implements code, and automates DevOps workflows.

item.title: PR-Agent — Coding Agents
item.description: Open-source AI PR reviewer that auto-describes, reviews, and improves pull requests.

item.title: Qodo — Coding Agents
item.description: AI code review platform with context-aware PR validation and security analysis.

item.title: Sourcegraph Cody — Coding Agents
item.description: AI coding assistant that excels at large codebases with an enterprise context engine.

item.title: SWE-agent — Coding Agents
item.description: Takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it.

item.title: Tabnine — Coding Agents
item.description: Privacy-first AI code completion with on-premise deployment and codebase fine-tuning options.

item.title: TaskWeaver — Coding Agents
item.description: A code-first agent framework from Microsoft for planning and executing data analytics tasks.

item.title: AionUi — Consumer Platforms
item.description: Connects 20+ AI CLIs and any API key in a local, open-source multi-agent desktop workspace.

item.title: ChatGPT — Consumer Platforms
item.description: General-purpose AI platform with GPTs, Deep Research, Canvas, and Agent Mode across the widest plugin ecosystem.

item.title: Claude — Consumer Platforms
item.description: Reasoning-focused AI with Computer Use, MCP integration, and Chrome browsing for coding and long document analysis.

item.title: Coze — Consumer Platforms
item.description: No-code agent builder with a marketplace of 100+ custom agents and plugin integrations.

item.title: Gemini — Consumer Platforms
item.description: Google's multimodal AI with 1M token context, Deep Think, Gems, and NotebookLM for workspace integration.

item.title: OpenHuman — Consumer Platforms
item.description: Self-hosted local-first personal AI assistant with a Rust core, desktop apps, knowledge-graph memory, skills, voice, and multi-channel messaging.

item.title: Adobe Firefly 3 — Creative Agents
item.description: Generates commercially safe images from text prompts using a model trained exclusively on licensed data.

item.title: DALL-E 3.5 — Creative Agents
item.description: Generates detailed images from text prompts with 95% text accuracy integrated directly into ChatGPT.

item.title: ElevenLabs Music — Creative Agents
item.description: Generates vocals and instrumentals with stem separation and per-section editing for audio production.

item.title: Google Imagen 4 — Creative Agents
item.description: Produces photorealistic images from text via Google DeepMind accessible through AI Studio.

item.title: Google Veo 3.1 — Creative Agents
item.description: Generates the highest cinematic quality video with native audio from text prompts via Google DeepMind.

item.title: Seedream AI Studio — Creative Agents
item.description: Multi-model AI image generation platform by ByteDance using Seedream 5.0/4.5/4.0 models with one-click image-to-video animation via Kling 2.1.

item.title: Sora 2 — Creative Agents
item.description: Generates 25-second cinematic video clips with strong narrative coherence from text prompts by OpenAI.

item.title: Stable Audio — Creative Agents
item.description: Generates instrumental audio tracks with a commercial license included by default for all outputs.

item.title: Ada — Customer Support & CRM
item.description: Resolves 60% of customer support tickets automatically with complex multi-turn query understanding.

item.title: Assembled — Customer Support & CRM
item.description: Routes support tickets with workforce-aware scheduling and intelligent handoff to human agents.

item.title: Dixa — Customer Support & CRM
item.description: CRM-first conversational support platform with AI-powered routing and customer context enrichment.

item.title: Dynamics 365 Copilot — Customer Support & CRM
item.description: Drafts, summarizes, and translates across Office 365 with deep Microsoft ecosystem integration.

item.title: Intercom Fin — Customer Support & CRM
item.description: Resolves 50% of SaaS support tickets by learning directly from your help center and knowledge base.

item.title: Salesforce Einstein — Customer Support & CRM
item.description: Enterprise AI with predictions, autonomous agents, and CRM automation across the Salesforce platform.

item.title: ServiceNow AI Agents — Customer Support & CRM
item.description: Orchestrates AI agents across IT, HR, and CRM workflows for enterprise service management.

item.title: Zendesk AI — Customer Support & CRM
item.description: Automates 30% of enterprise support tickets with deep integration into the existing Zendesk ecosystem.

item.title: Agency Swarm — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Orchestrates multi-agent systems built on the OpenAI Assistants API with role-based collaboration.

item.title: AgentScope — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Alibaba multi-agent framework with distributed deployment and fault tolerance for production use.

item.title: Anthropic SDK — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Official Claude SDK with tool use, computer control, and streaming for building Claude-native agents.

item.title: AutoGen — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Event-driven multi-agent framework merged with Semantic Kernel for production workflows.

item.title: AWS Bedrock Agents — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Managed AWS infrastructure for agents with Bedrock models, enterprise compliance, and auto-scaling deployment.

item.title: Haystack — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Production-ready AI orchestration framework focused on building customizable LLM applications and RAG pipelines.

item.title: Hivemoot — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Autonomous agent teams that collaboratively build software on GitHub.

item.title: LangSmith Fleet — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: No-code agent orchestration platform with visual workflow builder and enterprise deployment.

item.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Lightweight multi-agent SDK with tracing and guardrails from OpenAI.

item.title: PraisonAI — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Production multi-agent framework with self-reflection, MCP integration, and workflow automation.

item.title: Semantic Kernel — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Microsoft enterprise SDK for Python, C#, and Java with modular plugins, memory, and goal planning.

item.title: Swarm — Frameworks & SDKs
item.description: Lightweight framework for agent handoffs, context variables, and function calling patterns from OpenAI.

item.title: Anthropic Finance Agents — Industry Agents
item.description: Domain-specialized agents for earnings analysis and portfolio insight.

item.title: Goldman Sachs Marquee AI — Industry Agents
item.description: Market data and analytics agents built on Marquee platform.

item.title: JPMorgan AlphaBlue — Industry Agents
item.description: Trading and market analysis agent integrations for institutional workflows.

item.title: LexisNexis AI — Industry Agents
item.description: Document review and legal research agents.

item.title: Morgan Stanley AdvisorBot — Industry Agents
item.description: Financial advisory assistant for advisors and retail clients.

item.title: Nuance Healthcare AI — Industry Agents
item.description: Speech and clinical AI solutions for documentation and radiology.

item.title: Siemens AI Ops — Industry Agents
item.description: Factory-floor optimization and predictive maintenance agents.

item.title: Westlaw AI-Assisted Research — Industry Agents
item.description: Case law analysis and brief drafting agents.

item.title: Agent Starter — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: Project-local config manager that syncs one `agent.json` manifest into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and MCP setup while preserving manual edits and detecting drift.

item.title: AgentDock — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: Framework for building and deploying production-ready AI agents with composable node architecture.

item.title: AWS Bedrock AgentCore — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: Managed AWS infrastructure for Bedrock-based agents with compliance, scaling, and monitoring built in.

item.title: AWS Lambda — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: Serverless function runtime with Firecracker isolation for executing short-lived agent tasks at scale.

item.title: codex-profiles — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: Bash CLI for switching OpenAI Codex CLI and Desktop profiles with isolated CODEX_HOME directories.

item.title: Crawl4AI — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: Extracts structured data from web pages using LLM-friendly output formats optimized for agent ingestion.

item.title: Firecracker — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: Lightweight microVM technology with 125ms boot time used by AWS Lambda and E2B under the hood.

item.title: gVisor — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: User-space kernel that intercepts syscalls to provide VM-level security with container-level overhead.

item.title: Notte — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: Browser automation engine optimized for production AI pipelines.

item.title: Railway — Infrastructure & Tooling
item.description: One-click deploy from GitHub with persistent volumes and databases for stateful agent deployments.

item.title: Acontext — Memory & Context
item.description: Manages agent skills and long-term memory as a layered data structure for persistent context.

item.title: Agentage Memory — Memory & Context
item.description: Cross-vendor shared memory layer exposed as a remote MCP server at `memory.agentage.io/mcp` (Streamable HTTP, OAuth 2.1 + PKCE + DCR) that Claude, Cursor, and ChatGPT read and write as plain markdown you own.

item.title: Chroma — Memory & Context
item.description: Lightweight, embeddable vector store for building memory-augmented AI agents with fast semantic retrieval.

item.title: cognee — Memory & Context
item.description: Knowledge engine for AI agent memory, set up in 6 lines of code with graph-based knowledge extraction.

item.title: Cortex Memory — Memory & Context
item.description: Full-stack solution for agent memory covering extraction, vector search, and optimization.

item.title: Pinecone — Memory & Context
item.description: Managed vector database with agent namespaces for multi-tenant isolation, hybrid search (vector + keyword), serverless auto-scaling, and $11B valuation.

item.title: Activepieces — No-Code Builders
item.description: Open-source Zapier alternative with AI-powered automation nodes and visual workflow builder.

item.title: AgentGPT — No-Code Builders
item.description: Deploy AI agents in the browser with zero local setup required.

item.title: Dify — No-Code Builders
item.description: Open-source LLM app development platform with visual workflow builder and RAG orchestration.

item.title: FastAgency — No-Code Builders
item.description: Deploys multi-agent workflows as production APIs with minimal configuration and setup.

item.title: Flowise — No-Code Builders
item.description: Open-source drag-and-drop UI to build customized LLM flows, RAG pipelines, and agent systems.

item.title: Google Project IDX — No-Code Builders
item.description: AI-powered cloud IDE with free Claude Opus access for building full projects across all frameworks.

item.title: Temporal — No-Code Builders
item.description: Durable execution platform for long-running agent workflows with automatic retry and state persistence.

item.title: v0 by Vercel — No-Code Builders
item.description: Generates React and Tailwind UI components from text descriptions with one-click Vercel deployment.

item.title: CAJAL — Research Agents
item.description: Local AI agent that generates publication-ready IMRaD scientific papers with verified arXiv citations and AI tribunal scoring.

item.title: ChatGPT Deep Research — Research Agents
item.description: Conducts extended reasoning with web browsing to produce structured research reports with Canvas output.

item.title: Claude Deep Research — Research Agents
item.description: Performs multi-step investigation with verified source citations and 200K token context window.

item.title: DeerFlow — Research Agents
item.description: Multi-agent research system from ByteDance with planning and execution loops for autonomous investigation.

item.title: Gemini Deep Research — Research Agents
item.description: Leverages Google Search and Knowledge Graph integration with 1M token context for breadth-first research.

item.title: Perplexity Personal Computer — Research Agents
item.description: Autonomous research agent with vision capabilities, real-time search integration, and document analysis for comprehensive research workflows.

item.title: Perplexity Pro — Research Agents
item.description: Provides real-time search answers with inline citations and follow-up threads for iterative research.

item.title: Superhighway — Research Agents
item.description: Web search API for agents (search, news, scrape, research) with a Python guide for building an academic [literature-review agent](https://superhighway.walls.sh/guides/academic-research-agent).

item.title: Agent OS — Safety & Observability
item.description: Kernel architecture for governing autonomous AI agents with policy enforcement.

item.title: AgentDoG — Safety & Observability
item.description: Diagnostic guardrails that analyze full agent execution trajectories to detect instruction hijacking and tool misuse.

item.title: AgentGuard — Safety & Observability
item.description: Runtime observability and guardrails for AI agents with loop detection and anomaly alerts.

item.title: agenttrace — Safety & Observability
item.description: Local-first TUI for AI coding agent session observability with tokens, cost, latency, tool failures, anomalies, reports, diffs, and CI health gates.

item.title: APort Agent Guardrails — Safety & Observability
item.description: Pre-action authorization plugin for agent frameworks with policy-based access control.

item.title: ElevenAgents — Safety & Observability
item.description: Voice agent platform from ElevenLabs for customer support automation with HIPAA compliance and multi-language support.

item.title: LangSmith — Safety & Observability
item.description: LangChain platform for tracing, testing, and evaluating agent performance with production monitoring.

item.title: SWE-bench — Safety & Observability
item.description: Benchmark for evaluating LLMs on real-world software engineering tasks from GitHub issues.

item.title: Agentset — Voice Agents
item.description: Production RAG platform with reasoning, hybrid search, and full multimodal support.

item.title: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text v2 — Voice Agents
item.description: Google Cloud streaming and batch speech recognition API v2 with improved accuracy, streaming, and noise suppression for real-time agent pipelines.

item.title: LiveKit Agents — Voice Agents
item.description: Framework for building real-time, multimodal AI agents with voice, video, and data channels.

item.title: Nuance AI — Voice Agents
item.description: Enterprise speech and conversational AI platform for clinical and contact-center workflows with HIPAA-capable deployments.

item.title: Pipecat — Voice Agents
item.description: Production-grade voice AI framework with sub-250ms latency, WebRTC support, multimodal (voice+vision+text), real-time streaming, and 70+ language support.

item.title: PolyAI — Voice Agents
item.description: Enterprise voice AI platform for natural multi-turn conversations with high-volume call handling.

item.title: Rasa — Voice Agents
item.description: Open-source conversational AI framework with self-hosted NLU training and dialogue management.

item.title: Wispr Flow — Voice Agents
item.description: Voice orchestration platform for multimodal AI agents with 50+ language support, workflow building, and enterprise integrations.
